metadata.title: Snoonu Ads — Qatar's Retail Media Platform
metadata.description: Reach Qatar's most active shoppers. Connect with 1.5M+ users on Qatar's most-used super app, powered by real purchase data and AI.

hero.subhead: Advertise to 1.5M+ high-intent buyers on Qatar's #1 super app. First-party data. AI targeting. Real ROAS.

solutions.headline: A Full-Funnel Solution to Meet All Your Needs
solutions.description: Three ways to grow on Qatar's largest retail media platform.

awareness.title: Brand Awareness
awareness.benefit: Get seen by millions of high-intent shoppers across every Snoonu surface.

conversions.title: Drive Conversions
conversions.benefit: Capture demand at the moment of search and turn browsers into buyers.

acquisition.title: Acquire Customers
acquisition.benefit: Use first-party data to find and convert your ideal audience in Qatar.

howItWorks.headline: From Discovery to Checkout
howItWorks.subhead: Your ads follow the shopper journey at every touchpoint — reaching customers at every stage of intent.

placements.headline: Your Ads, Everywhere That Matters
placements.description: Native placements across the entire Snoonu experience, online and offline.

checkoutBanner.title: Checkout Banner
checkoutBanner.alt: Snoonu app checkout screen showing a promotional banner during order tracking
features: Ensures your brand reaches many user profiles, especially those who make purchases on Snoonu

searchBanner.title: Search Banner
searchBanner.alt: Snoonu app search screen with a promotional banner ad
features: Highest conversion rate of all formats due to active searching behaviors
Best to combine with awareness format to expand Marketing funnel

categoryBanner.title: Category Banner
categoryBanner.alt: Snoonu app groceries category page with store listings
features: Placement on category pages with 30K–35K daily impressions to increase brand awareness
Strategic campaign driving attention to your products and value propositions

foodSliders.title: Food Sliders
foodSliders.alt: Snoonu app homepage showing food slider carousel with restaurant promotions
features: Prime placement on Snoonu homepage with up to 10M+ daily impressions
Highlights your specific products or bundles
Best for promoting high-margin SKUs, campaign heroes, or limited offers

searchPromotedListings.title: Search & Promoted Listings
searchPromotedListings.alt: Snoonu app search results showing sponsored listings with Ad badges
features: Search Ads: Bid on keywords to appear in top 10 search results with Pay-per-Click model
Food Listing: allows you to reach up to 10M users browsing Snoonu on a daily basis

audience.headline: Why Snoonu Audience Wins
audience.description: High-intent shoppers with real purchase data. No third-party cookies needed.

browse.body: Users explore products before checkout. Your ad is part of that journey.

frequency.body: High repeat frequency means more touchpoints and chances to convert.

premium.title: Premium subscribers
premium.body: High-spending users with elevated basket sizes.

aiTargeting.headline: The right ad, the right person, the right moment
aiTargeting.description: Snoonu Ads uses machine learning to serve the right ad to the right person at the right moment — driving higher engagement and superior ROI.

locationTargeting.label: Location Targeting
locationTargeting.description: Neighbourhood, city, or country-level geo-targeting with hyperlocal precision for Qatar & GCC.

behavioralData.label: Behavioural Data
behavioralData.description: Retarget users based on what they've browsed, ordered, or searched for previously on Snoonu.

demographics.label: Demographics
demographics.description: Age, language, device type and more — reach your exact customer profile within our app audience.

purchaseIntent.label: Purchase Intent AI
purchaseIntent.description: Machine learning identifies users at peak purchase-intent based on real-time behavioural signals.

results.headline: Real Performance, Real Revenue
results.description: Every campaign on Snoonu is measured against actual orders, not vanity metrics.

caseStudy.title: How a leading QSR brand drove 4.7x ROAS with Snoonu Ads
caseStudy.body: By targeting high-intent food searchers with sponsored listings and push notifications during peak hours, this brand turned Snoonu into their #1 digital acquisition channel.

results.footnote: More case studies launching soon. Results above represent platform averages.

pricing.description: Every plan includes first-party data targeting, closed-loop measurement, and access to Snoonu's high-intent shoppers.

growth.name: Growth

growth.outcome: Turn Snoonu Ads into a reliable revenue channel

pricing.footerSuffix: tailored to your goals and budget in under 48 hours.

calculator.headline: Plan Your Snoonu Ads Budget
calculator.description: Three quick choices, one clear estimate. Final quote factors in creative, dates, and inventory.

step1.title: Where are your customers?
step1.hint: Pick one or more zones. Defaults to all of Qatar.

step2.title: Which placements?
step2.hint: Pick as many as you like.

step3.title: For how long?
step3.hint: Drag to set your campaign length.

step4.title: Who do you want to reach?

estimate.label: Your estimate
estimate.disclaimer: Indicative range. Final quote depends on creative, dates, inventory, and seasonality.

items.a: Snoonu Ads is Qatar's retail media platform. It lets brands reach 1.5M+ high-intent shoppers through native app placements, sponsored search results, push notifications, video ads, and offline surfaces like S-Charge stations.

items.q: Do I need to be a Snoonu merchant to advertise?
items.a: No. Any brand operating in Qatar can advertise on Snoonu, whether or not your products are listed on the platform. We support both on-platform and off-platform campaign goals.

Our AI-powered targeting uses Snoonu's first-party purchase data, including location, past orders, search behavior, and spending patterns, to reach the right users at peak buying intent. No third-party cookies needed.

Every campaign gets a real-time dashboard with impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS. Our closed-loop measurement ties ad exposure directly to actual Snoonu orders, so you know exactly what your spend drove.
Our Starter plan begins at QAR 15,000/month. For sponsored search listings, you can start with pay-per-click from as little as 1 QAR per click. Contact us to discuss custom budgets.
Absolutely. All campaign data is fully confidential and never shared with other advertisers on the platform. Your competitive insights stay yours.

contact.headline: Let's Build Your Growth Engine on Snoonu
contact.description: Get a custom media plan tailored to your goals and budget in under 48 hours.
outcomes: First-party data targeting from day one

form.name: Full Name
form.goalsPlaceholder: What do you want to achieve?

success.title: Thanks for reaching out!

footer.tagline: Qatar's retail media platform connecting brands with high-intent shoppers across the country.
